case_for: Kelce has flashed high-ceiling weeks (15.9 and 16.0 pts) showing he can still produce as Mahomes' top target when the game script favors him
case_against: His volatile recent form with three sub-8 point games including a 1.6-point dud and a 5.7-point week just before this one, combined with a low 5.7 pt consensus projection, suggests his role/production has diminished
